title: Crossbow Multicharge
description: This is a Minecraft Fabric 1.20.1 mod that adds ability to charge into the crossbow multiple arrows or fireworks
body:
## CrossbowMulticharge is ... A _Minecraft Fabric 1.20.1_ mod that adds ability to charge into the crossbow **multiple arrows or fireworks** ## Basics of this mod ### How to charge crossbow? If you try to charge crossbow, you may notice that crossbow behaviour is vanilla. Now you need **sneaking** while *charging crossbow* to charge more than one arrow.
### How many slots crossbow have? Crossbow without '*Storage*' enchantment have **6** slots ### How i can check what charged into a crossbow? With this mod in-game hud will *changed* — right under the crosshair the new bar will *show* you **currently charged arrows/fireworks**
![Crossbow HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc83ff782ba15ee8a0a6a9906cfdf8fe8cd9b3d6.png) > P.S. You can load arrows **and** fireworks into one crossbow. ## New enchantment This mod also adds a new enchantment called "*Storage*" It adds **4** new slots to the crossbow.
![Enchanted Crossbow HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7156478aba7152127ba24d7451467a62e7fd55e0.png) > Enchanted Crossbow ## Note! This mod maybe not compatible with other mods that change crossbow (currently untested)
